boundary_binding.action_boundary: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL closes the exact boundary and ties it to current scope/authority
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: would escalate only if source-control records did not close the exact boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: three-way match plus approver limit is current per CTL; urgent tone is irrelevant

final_answer: Source records close the requested invoice-release boundary. The controlling CTL record states the three-way match plus approver limit is current, exact, and tied to the action. POL requires execution only when current source records close the exact boundary, and BND says tone or urgency cannot override source control. No open source defect remains, so the action may proceed.
